question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter their name (as a single word) and their age. Then, print a greeting message displaying both pieces of information.

test_cases.expected: Enter your name: Enter your age: Hello, Charlie! You are 25 years old.
Enter your name: Enter your age: Hello, Diana! You are 42 years old.

errors: The program uses C-style I/O functions (`printf`, `scanf`) which are generally less type-safe and idiomatic in modern C++ compared to `std::cout` and `std::cin`. Variable names (`n`, `a`) are cryptic and lack descriptive meaning, reducing readability and maintainability.
